description_long: This is a modern, rectangular two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of light gray and white walls, with large, black-framed windows arranged in vertical and horizontal patterns. The front facade includes a small set of steps leading to a recessed entry door, and a patch of green lawn flanks the entrance. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with fewer windows, emphasizing privacy. The interior layout is partially visible, showing multiple rooms and open spaces. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a minimalist gray-and-white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, door, large windows, and a patch of green lawn.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid gray wall and a single vertical window near the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying several tall, narrow windows and a solid wall with minimal openings.
description_view_3: Right side view with a large, unbroken gray wall and a glimpse of the front steps and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and narrow vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single door, small set of steps, and no porch or overhang
